name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze the website at {website_url} and provide an SEO strategy focused on these keywords: {keywords_list}.
prompts.use_case: Improving website conversion rates through targeted copy and layout adjustments.

prompts.name: copywriting_enhancement_prompt
prompts.template: Improve the following marketing copy for higher conversions and engagement: {content_data}.
prompts.use_case: Creating SEO-optimized marketing content to increase organic traffic.

prompts.name: conversion_rate_optimization_prompt
prompts.template: Given these performance metrics: {performance_metrics}, suggest CRO improvements to meet these marketing goals: {marketing_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Generating data-driven growth strategies for digital marketing campaigns.

prompts.name: growth_strategy_prompt
prompts.template: Create a growth engineering plan based on this analytics report: {analytics_report} and the target goals: {marketing_goals}.
prompts.use_case: Enhancing AI agent marketing capabilities with advanced marketing skillsets.
